---
name: Translation correction
about: Report a translation error or suggest an improvement
title: '[Translation] '
labels: translation
assignees: ''
---

**Language**
Which language has the issue? (e.g. Macedonian, Romani)

**Where is the error?**
Which page or section? Quote the current text if you can.

**What should it say?**
The corrected translation.

**Are you a native speaker of this language?**
Yes / No
